_fixture_meta.description: Discretionary-macro persona adds TLT citing a medium-term regime change thesis (Fed pivot + growth deceleration) — macro narrative, not price momentum.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; uses publicly known macro narrative framework

thesis_status.reason: Medium-term thesis: the Fed pivot thesis has now been confirmed by three sequential CPI prints below 3% and a manufacturing PMI that has contracted for four consecutive months. Historically, this combination has preceded a 200–300bp rally in 10-year yields within 12 months. The macro regime is shifting from 'higher for longer' to 'first cut priced' — TLT is the cleanest expression of duration exposure to a Fed normalisation cycle over the next 12–18 months.
